# With spice.restack.method=merge, a conflict resolved during one restack
# does not recur on a later restack: the merge commit records the
# resolution, so subsequent merges of the base do not replay it.

as 'Test <test@example.com>'
at '2024-05-27T18:24:42Z'

mkdir repo
cd repo
git init
git add init.txt
git commit -m 'Initial commit'
gs repo init

# use the merge method for restacks.
git config spice.restack.method merge

# stack: main -> a -> b.
# 'a' modifies init.txt; 'b' adds an independent file.
cp $WORK/extra/init.a.txt init.txt
git add init.txt
gs bc -m a

cp $WORK/extra/b.txt b.txt
git add b.txt
gs bc -m b

# advance trunk with a change to init.txt that conflicts with 'a'.
gs trunk
cp $WORK/extra/init.trunk1.txt init.txt
git add init.txt
git commit -m 'Trunk change 1'

# restack the upstack of 'a': merging trunk into 'a' conflicts.
gs branch checkout a
! gs upstack restack
stderr 'There was a conflict while merging'
stderr '  gs continue'

# resolve the conflict in 'a' and continue;
# this drains the continuation and restacks 'b' too.
cp $WORK/extra/init.resolved.txt init.txt
git add init.txt
env EDITOR=true
gs continue

# both branches are restacked; 'a' carries a merge commit.
! exists .git/MERGE_HEAD
gs ls -a
cmp stderr $WORK/golden/ls-1.txt
git graph --branches
cmp stdout $WORK/golden/graph-1.txt

# 'a' holds the resolved content.
gs branch checkout a
cmp init.txt $WORK/extra/init.resolved.txt

# Now advance trunk again with a DIFFERENT, non-conflicting change
# (a brand new file). The previously-resolved init.txt conflict
# must NOT come back.
gs trunk
cp $WORK/extra/extra.txt extra.txt
git add extra.txt
git commit -m 'Trunk change 2'

# restack the upstack of 'a' again: this time it completes cleanly,
# without re-raising the init.txt conflict.
gs branch checkout a
gs upstack restack
stderr 'a: restacked on main'
stderr 'b: restacked on a'

# no merge was left pending and no conflict prompt was shown.
! exists .git/MERGE_HEAD
! stderr 'There was a conflict while merging'
! stderr 'gs continue'

# the resolved content survived; the new trunk file is present.
gs branch checkout a
cmp init.txt $WORK/extra/init.resolved.txt
exists extra.txt

-- repo/init.txt --
initial init

-- extra/init.a.txt --
a's init

-- extra/init.trunk1.txt --
trunk's init

-- extra/init.resolved.txt --
resolved init

-- extra/b.txt --
feature b

-- extra/extra.txt --
extra trunk file

-- golden/ls-1.txt --
  ┏━□ b
┏━┻■ a ◀
main
-- golden/graph-1.txt --
*   23b6c50 (b) Merge branch 'a' into b
|\  
| *   1f267af (HEAD -> a) Merge branch 'main' into a
| |\  
| | * 0a5d427 (main) Trunk change 1
* | | 5ca01d1 b
|/ /  
* / 3222581 a
|/  
* d692027 Initial commit
